SEARCH
程序包 login

类 AccountInfoWriter

java.lang.Object
login.AccountInfoWriter
public class AccountInfoWriter extends Object
The AccountInfoWriter class is responsible for writing and updating user data in the system. It handles operations such as creating new user accounts, writing task information, and managing relationships between accounts.

  • 构造器概要

    构造器
    构造器
    说明
    AccountInfoWriter()
     

  • 方法概要

    修饰符和类型
    方法
    说明
    void
    deliverTask(String parentEmail, String kidEmail, Task task)
    Delivers a task from a parent to a child.

    Checks for duplicate emails in the system to prevent overlapping accounts.

    findEmail(String email, String registerTable)
    Finds the directory path for the given email in the registration table.

    The entry point of application.

    taskDeleter(String email, String taskID)
    Deletes a task from the user's task file.

    Modifies an existing task's details.
    void
    taskSubmit(String kidEmail, String parentEmail, String taskDetail)
    Submits a task for verification by a parent, creating a notification for the parent about the task submission.

    Writes account information into the system.

    Establishes a parent-child relationship in the system by writing to their respective files.

    Writes a task to the user's task list.

  • 构造器详细资料

    • AccountInfoWriter

      public AccountInfoWriter()

  • 方法详细资料

    • writeAccountInfo

      public Boolean writeAccountInfo(String email, String password, String id, String group)
      Writes account information into the system. This method checks for duplicate accounts before creating a new one.
      参数:
      email - the email of the user
      password - the password of the user
      id - the ID of the user
      group - the group (e.g., 'parent' or 'kid')
      返回:
      true if the account was successfully created, false otherwise

    • main

      public static void main(String[] args)
      The entry point of application.
      参数:
      args - the input arguments

    • examDuplicate

      public boolean examDuplicate(String email)
      Checks for duplicate emails in the system to prevent overlapping accounts.
      参数:
      email - the email to check
      返回:
      true if the email already exists, false otherwise

    • findEmail

      public String findEmail(String email, String registerTable)
      Finds the directory path for the given email in the registration table.
      参数:
      email - the email
      registerTable - the register table
      返回:
      the directory path as a string if found, null otherwise

    • writeTask

      public void writeTask(String taskName, String email, double money)
      Writes a task to the user's task list.
      参数:
      taskName - the name of the task
      email - the email of the user
      money - the monetary value of the task

    • writeRelationship

      public void writeRelationship(String parentEmail, String kidsEmail)
      Establishes a parent-child relationship in the system by writing to their respective files.
      参数:
      parentEmail - the email of the parent
      kidsEmail - the email of the child

    • deliverTask

      public void deliverTask(String parentEmail, String kidEmail, Task task)
      Delivers a task from a parent to a child.
      参数:
      parentEmail - the email of the parent
      kidEmail - the email of the child
      task - the task to be delivered

    • taskModifier

      public void taskModifier(String email, String taskID, String taskName, Double award)
      Modifies an existing task's details.
      参数:
      email - the email of the user whose task is to be modified
      taskID - the ID of the task to modify
      taskName - the new name of the task
      award - the new monetary reward for the task

    • taskDeleter

      public void taskDeleter(String email, String taskID)
      Deletes a task from the user's task file.
      参数:
      email - the email of the user
      taskID - the ID of the task to delete

    • taskSubmit

      public void taskSubmit(String kidEmail, String parentEmail, String taskDetail)
      Submits a task for verification by a parent, creating a notification for the parent about the task submission.
      参数:
      kidEmail - the email of the child who completed the task
      parentEmail - the email of the parent to notify
      taskDetail - detailed information about the task
